remember: Students will be able to recall the basic structure of the Earth's interior
Students will be able to identify the different layers of the Earth's interior
Students will be able to describe the characteristics of the crust, mantle, outer core, and inner core
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of the Earth's interior and its composition
Students will be able to distinguish between the different layers of the Earth's interior and their properties
Students will be able to describe the importance of understanding the Earth's interior
apply: Students will be able to apply their knowledge of the Earth's interior to understand geological processes
Students will be able to use their understanding of the Earth's interior to explain natural phenomena such as earthquakes and volcanic eruptions
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the relationship between the Earth's interior and its surface processes
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of human activities on the Earth's interior and its consequences

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the basic structure of the Earth's interior
As per NCERT objective 2, to describe the characteristics of the different layers of the Earth's interior
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the ability to recall and describe the structure and composition of the Earth's interior
CBSE evaluates the understanding of the relationship between the Earth's interior and its surface processes
